content: Self-Refine's iterative single-model self-feedback framework can be modified to integrate the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid `Multi-Perspective Self-Refine` framework that retains Self-Refine's advantage of no extra training or supervision while resolving the common limitation of blind spots in single-perspective self-feedback. This hybrid approach could improve output quality on difficult reasoning and code generation tasks far beyond what either existing method achieves alone.
